description_long: This is a medium-sized, open cardboard shipping box with flaps partially extended outward. The box is constructed from corrugated brown cardboard and features black Amazon-branded packing tape running vertically and horizontally across the top. The Amazon logo and branding are visible on the tape and the lower side of the box. The interior is empty, revealing the corrugated texture and the box's structural folds. The box appears lightweight and is commonly used for parcel delivery in urban environments.
description: A medium brown cardboard Amazon shipping box with open flaps and branded black tape, empty inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with both side flaps extended and Amazon-branded tape running down the center.
description_view_1: Side view with the left flap extended and the Amazon logo partially visible on the lower box exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with open flaps and Amazon tape, but the tape's logo is reversed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the right flap extended and a large, partial Amazon smile logo visible.
